Lawn Game Rentals in Stewiacke NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals provides lawn game rentals to Stewiacke NS — a small Colchester County town on the Stewiacke River known for its dinosaur fossil discoveries — from our Bridgewater base. Northern Nova Scotia communities with industrial and agricultural roots have a strong tradition of community events, school fun days, and family gatherings that our inflatable and party rental lineup supports well.

Travel from Bridgewater to Stewiacke NS is approximately 115 km. The first 15 km is free; travel beyond that is quoted at $0.72/km (estimate ~$72 one way, confirmed before booking). Availability, setup suitability, staffing requirements, and deposit details are all confirmed before your booking is finalized.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Carnival Challenge - Interactive Game, $270, Dry-use - Carnival-style inflatable challenge game for all ages.
  • Crown Kick Darts - Interactive Game, $160, Dry-use - Giant inflatable football darts game for all ages.
  • Crown Axe Challenge - Interactive Game, $180, Dry-use - Inflatable axe throwing for friendly competition.

Best For

  • Backyard parties
  • Corporate events
  • School events
  • Community gatherings

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you deliver lawn games to Stewiacke NS?
Yes. We deliver lawn games to Stewiacke NS by availability and travel quote from Bridgewater, approximately 115 km away. Travel beyond the first 15 km is quoted at $0.72/km.
What lawn game packages are available?
We offer three lawn game packages: 5 games for $175, 10 games for $250, or all 12 games including Cornhole for $280. You can also add Cornhole to a 5 or 10 game package for an additional $25.
What types of lawn games do you have?
Our 12 lawn games span three categories: throwing games (like Cornhole and Axe Challenge), target games (like Kick Darts and Carnival Challenge), and giant board games (like Giant Jenga and Giant Connect 4). A full list is available on our website.
Can lawn games be used indoors?
Many of our lawn games can be set up indoors in a gymnasium or large hall as well as outdoors on grass or hard surfaces. Let us know your venue type when enquiring and we will confirm suitability.
Can I add lawn games to an inflatable rental?
Yes. Lawn games can be booked as standalone rentals or added on to an inflatable rental or party package. Adding games to a larger rental is a great way to keep guests of all ages entertained.
